title: Service rates
description: Suggested list prices for grooming and boarding at checkout.

form.description_grooming: Set the suggested list price for a grooming service at checkout.
form.description_hotel: Set the suggested list price per night or stay at checkout.
form.codigo_locked: The service cannot be changed when editing.

delete.title: Delete rate
delete.description: Delete the rate for {{nombre}}? POS will still allow manual pricing.

empty.grooming: Create a rate to suggest prices when charging grooming appointments.
empty.hotel: Create a rate to suggest nightly prices when charging stays.

catalogo.grooming_description: Each clinic defines its own services with list price and duration.
catalogo.hotel_description: Each clinic defines its own stay types with nightly list price.
catalogo.clinica_description: Catalog of treatments and procedures. Pick a reusable category (or create one on the fly) and use them at checkout.
catalogo.empty_grooming: No services yet. Create one or wait for initial suggestions.
catalogo.empty_hotel: No stay types yet. Create one or wait for initial suggestions.
catalogo.empty_clinica: No clinical services yet. Create treatments, consults, or other items with a list price.
catalogo.form_description_grooming: Name, category, list price and duration for scheduling and checkout.
catalogo.form_description_hotel: Name, category and nightly list price for stays and checkout.
catalogo.form_description_clinica: Name, reusable category and list price for checkout without retyping each time.

form.categoria_empty: No categories. Type to create one.

insumos.title: Service supplies
insumos.description: Define which supplies «{{servicio}}» uses and the price of each one.
insumos.description_generic: Define which supplies the service uses and the price of each one.
insumos.add_hint: Pick one from your clinic catalog or type a new one to create it.
insumos.empty_catalog: No supplies. Type to create a new one.
insumos.empty_rows: You haven't assigned supplies to this service yet.
